transcript: The place based off the Patagonia logo is heaven on earth. Patagonia, located in and around the Argentina-Chile border, is one of earth's masterpieces. Due to it being near the bottom of South America, Patagonia boasts some of the most magnificent icebergs and even a large population of penguins. Interestingly enough, the region has a strong Welsh population due to 19th century immigrants, which you can still find communities of today. The region also includes the most southern city in the world, Ushuaia, which is often referred to as the end of the world because of its location.
